results.rendered_html:
laghutā (von laghu) f.
1〉 Behendigkeit, Geschicklichkeit  MBH. 7,4654. fg.  bāhūnām  MĀRK. P. 19,15 .
— 2〉 Leichtigkeit  SUŚR. 1,43,20 . 149,1 . 17 . 313,4 .  ṚT. 3,4 . śarīra˚  Verz. d. Oxf. H. 237,a, No. 568 .
— 3〉 prosodische Kürze  VARĀH. BṚH. S. 104,57 .  Ind. St. 8,223 .
— 4〉 Kleinheit, Kürze, Geringigkeit, Unbedeutendheit: kaśmalaṃ laghutāṃ yāti  MBH. 13,7145 . dināni laghutāṃ yayuḥ wurden kurz  RĀJA-TAR. 3,170 .
— 5〉 Leichtsinn, Uebereilung, Unüberlegtheit  R. 2,27,2 .
— 6〉 geringes Ansehen, Mangel an Würde, Erniedrigung  R. 5,70,9 .  Spr. 1079 . 2505 . 4508 . 4911 .  ŚIŚ. 9,56 .  VARĀH. BṚH. S. 104,57 .  BHĀG. P. 5,1,20 .

results.rendered_html:
laghutā, -tvaṃ
1 Lightness, levity.
2 Smallness, littleness.
3 (a) Insignificance, unimportance, contempt, absence of dignity; iṃdro'pi laghutāṃ yāti svayaṃ prakhyāpitairguṇaiḥ. (b) Obscurity of birth, humbleness of origin.
4 Dishonour, disrespect;  Pt. 1. 140 , 353. 
5 Activity, quickness.
6 Shortness, brevity.
7 Ease, facility.
8 Thoughtlessness, frivolity.
9 Wantonness.
